message:
style(core): formatting and minor clarity fixes across subsystems

Apply rustfmt line-length normalisations and minor readability tweaks
across cancel, channel, combinator, cx, h2, hpack, jetstream, semaphore,
conformal, web/response, and quic_native/connection modules. No
behavioural changes — purely cosmetic adjustments that surfaced during a
cross-module audit pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
